channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Alex Bregman leads list of MLB free agents still available as pitchers and catchers report to spring training
item.description: Alex Bregman is, without a doubt, the top free agent still available, but these other five players still don't have a home as pitchers and catchers report.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Historic decider as Goodison Park prepares to host Everton vs Liverpool derby for one final time
item.description: One of English soccer’s most venerable and atmospheric stadiums is preparing to host a Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool later Wednesday for the 120th and final time with eternal bragging rights at stake.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bellingham strikes late for Real Madrid in 3-2 win at Man City in Champions League 1st leg playoff
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Real Madrid’s Galacticos just don’t know when they are beaten. Manchester City just keep on making the same mistakes. Jude Bellingham’s stoppage-time goal sealed a stunning comeback for Madrid and a 3-2 lead in its Champions League playoff against City.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: UConn's Liam McNeeley draws inspiration for 38-point performance from Creighton fans heckling Hurley
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — UConn freshman star Liam McNeeley hadn't played in front of a crowd as hostile as the one the Huskies faced in Omaha on Tuesday night. He found the environment inspiring.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Egor Demin leads BYU past West Virginia, 73-69
item.description: MORGANTOWN, W.V. (ABC4 Sports) - Freshman Egor Demin scored 16 points to lead BYU to a 73-69 win over West Virginia on Tuesday night. Kanon Catchings added 11 points for BYU (16-8, 7-6 Big 12). "Gutsy win by our guys," said BYU head coach Kevin Young.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: ESPN star warns Chiefs' Travis Kelce about turning into 'diminishing player' ahead of eventual retirement
item.description: While Kelce did receive Pro Bowl honors for a tenth straight year and remains productive player, he is closer to the end of his football career than the beginning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Fresh off a World Series win, the Los Angeles Dodgers look even more formidable in 2025
item.description: The Los Angeles Dodgers went through a light workout and most of the usual superstars were out on the field, including National League MVP Shohei Ohtani and Mookie Betts.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NASCAR drivers divided on new rule that could guarantee Helio Castroneves a spot in the Daytona 500
item.description: DAYTONA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — A controversial new NASCAR rule designed for “world-class drivers" could give Helio Castroneves an automatic berth into the Daytona 500, and, should the four-time Indianapolis 500 winner use the provisional, it would make for the largest field in a decade.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA All-Star Game salutes Bay Area music scene with great lineup of talent
item.description: E-40, En Vogue, Saweetie among Bay Area stars set to appear at NBA All-Star Game festivities at Golden State Warriors' Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Jim Harrington, The Mercury News

item.title: Kevin Hart will be first-ever emcee at NBA All-Star Game in San Francisco
item.description: Get ready to laugh it up with funnyman Kevin Hart as the NBA All-Star Game comes to the Golden State Warriors' Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Jim Harrington, The Mercury News

item.title: Steve Smith Sr. unhappy with former teammate Cam Newton calling Panthers 'losers' prior his arrival
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — Former Carolina star wide receiver Steve Smith Sr. took exception to comments made by ex-teammate Cam Newton, who called the Panthers “losers” before he arrived in 2011 as the franchise's No. 1 overall pick.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Champions League global rights deal set to be struck by U.S. agency Relevent with UEFA, clubs
item.description: GENEVA (AP) — UEFA and top European soccer clubs are set to drop the Swiss agency that has sold Champions League rights since 1992 and replace it with the U.S. firm of Miami Dolphins owner Stephen Ross.
item.dc:creator: GRAHAM DUNBAR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lindsey Vonn says 'I didn’t help myself' with social media posts involving Mikaela Shiffrin
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — Lindsey Vonn acknowledged that “I didn’t help myself” by firing back on social media after learning that she wasn’t paired with Mikaela Shiffin for Tuesday’s team combined race at the skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cubs spring training: Shota Imanaga ready to help anchor starting rotation after spectacular rookie season
item.description: MESA, Ariz. — Old Man Winter has its icy grip on Chicagoland this week, but here's a warm reminder that summer is inching closer: Cubs pitchers and catchers reported to camp Monday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Rubiales tells judge that Hermoso gave him consent for kiss after 2023 Women's World Cup
item.description: MADRID (AP) — Former Spanish soccer federation president Luis Rubiales reiterated before a judge on Tuesday that forward Jenni Hermoso gave him consent for a kiss at the 2023 Women’s World Cup final presentation ceremony.
item.dc:creator: TALES AZZONI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl returning to the Bay Area for 2026
item.description: (KRON) -- The Super Bowl is coming back to the Bay Area next year. A decade ago, the region hosted Super Bowl 50. Next year, it will play host to Super Bowl LX. On Monday morning, San Jose Mayor Matt Mahan was in New Orleans for the official Super Bowl handoff.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: A presidential first: Trump at the Super Bowl, latest chapter in a complicated legacy with football
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — As a student, Donald Trump played high school football. As a business baron, he owned a team in an upstart rival to the NFL and then sued the established league. As president, he denigrated pros who took a knee during the national anthem as part of a social justice movement.
item.dc:creator: DARLENE SUPERVILLE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: What's at stake, who's announcing, who's performing and what time does it start? Everything to know
item.description: Sean Lewis and Jewell Hillery talked with Rod Carter, live from New Orleans for The Big Game, on Sunday's WGN Weekend Morning News. See the attached video player to watch. Super Bowl Sunday weekend has arrived.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Former Bears coach Dick Jauron dies at 74
item.description: Longtime NFL player and coach Dick Jauron, who led the Chicago Bears to the playoffs and was voted AP coach of the year in 2001, died Saturday. He was 74.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: McCallum wins all-around as Red Rocks beat Arizona
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Grace McCallum won the all-around with a score of 39.65 to lead the 4th-ranked Utah gymnastics team past #19 Arizona, 197.675 to 196.125.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: NFL has no plans to end DEI practices, commissioner says
item.description: The NFL is committed to sticking to its DEI policies despite a change in its Super Bowl on-field messaging campaign
item.dc:creator: Libbey Dean, NewsNation

item.title: Jazz acquire guard KJ Martin at trade deadline
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was a busy trade deadline for the Utah Jazz, but when all the dust settled, the Jazz are coming away with one new player and five draft picks.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Ohtani's former interpreter receives nearly 5-year sentence for stealing from star athlete
item.description: Ippei Mizuhara, who became a national figure for his on-field service and off-field friendship to Los Angeles Dodgers superstar Shohei Ohtani, has been sentenced to 57 months in prison for stealing millions from the Japanese phenom.
item.dc:creator: Travis Schlepp, KTLA 5

item.title: Edwards scores 49 to lead Wolves over short-handed Bulls 127-108
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — Anthony Edwards scored 49 points, including 20 in the third quarter, as the Minnesota Timberwolves beat the short-handed Chicago Bulls 127-108 on Wednesday night. Edwards hit six 3-pointers and was 17 of 18 from the free-throw line and also added nine rebounds.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Several student-athletes lock in colleges on first NSD of 2025
item.description: Sean Lewis made it clear he wanted to put a fence around San Diego in the recruiting world. He proved it in the high school realm by bringing in 2024 Iron Hog winner Jett Thomas of La Jolla.
item.dc:creator: Brandon Stone, Fox 5
